reviews.quote: The mangkuk tingkat set is a game changer. Nostalgic, generous, and hits different at 2am. Will be back.
reviews.name: Aisyah R.

reviews.quote: Best late-night spot in Wangsa Maju. The lamb chop under RM20 is unreal. Staff are super friendly too.
reviews.name: Faizal M.

reviews.quote: Love the industrial vibe and the kopi tarik. Perfect lepak spot after class at TAR UMT.
reviews.name: Hakim T.
